# Pull Request

## Description

Provide a concise explanation of the changes made, the context, and any specific issue it closes.

Fixes #

## Empirical Verification (UTRs)

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> PRs that change runtime behavior MUST include empirical Unit Test Results (UTRs) to be approved by adversarial reviewers. The presence of test files is computationally insufficient proof of functionality. Paste the raw CLI execution logs demonstrating your tests successfully functioning against these changes. For docs-only or CI-only changes where runtime test output is not meaningful, write `N/A` and briefly explain why (this exception is defined in `.github/instructions/review.instructions.md`).

**Test Execution Command Run:**
`<command here, or N/A for docs-only / CI-only changes>`

**Empirical Output/Logs:**

```text
<PASTE EXHAUSTIVE CLI TEST OUTPUT (UTRs) HERE, OR WRITE "N/A — docs-only change" / "N/A — CI-only change">
```
